market_pulse: Late May momentum cooling into June; competitors ramping volume with touring headliners (David Guetta, Tiësto, Steve Aoki, Medusa Music) while LIV maintains steady weekend residency content.

content_gaps.description: Multi-week residency tours from major touring DJs (David Guetta at LIV Beach late May, Tiësto at TAO Beach June 8, Steve Aoki at OMNIA June 19) driving engagement; LIV relying on weekly residents vs. announced touring talent.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Announce June touring lineup or resident showcase series with multi-week commitment; differentiate from competitor 'one-off' headliner model.

content_gaps.description: Competitors seeing high UGC volume around 'outfit/dress code' and 'bottle service' flex posts; trending audio on TikTok focuses on pre-game and VIP experience narratives.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create trending soundscape around 'LIV luxury moments' — partner with 2-3 Vegas fashion/lifestyle creators for dress code + VIP experience content.

content_gaps.description: No story activity detected from LIV accounts this week; competitors using Instagram Stories for flash countdowns and 'go live' announcements 1-2 hours before doors.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement daily story schedule: 24h countdown Friday/Saturday nights, 2h pre-door announcement, post-event highlight reel.

influencer_activity.mention: Featured as headline talent at LIV Nightclub May 29 (EDC Week); high engagement expected from hip-hop/rap crossover audience.
Resident DJ at LIV Nightclub May 30; house/electronic producer with strong TikTok presence driving younger demographic interest.
Closing LIV Nightclub EDC Week (May 31); tech house specialist with loyal fan base in Vegas summer season.
Performed at LIV Beach May 30; mega-headliner status driving mainstream media coverage and cross-platform promotion.
Performing at Zouk May 30; direct competitor for same EDM demographic as LIV, strong TikTok following.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Tech house duo performing LIV Beach May 31; consistently high-engagement content creators with devoted following.
